name: algorithmic-art
tagline: Generates a self-contained p5.js generative-art HTML artifact plus a philosophy write-up, from a fixed branded template, using seeded.
verdict: Well-scoped p5.js art generator: clear triggers, concrete steps, template externalization, pinned CDN dependency, reproducible seeding. Weaknesses: contradicts itself on whether standalone .js files are produced, gives zero guidance for a missing template or failed CDN load, has no version/changelog signal, states no exclusions despite overlapping creative.

highlights.summary: Line 97: agent must embed a reference 'without announcing itself' into the art - undisclosed in the description, in tension with its anti-copying clause.
No 'NOT for' or exclusion text anywhere, despite overlap with other creative skills (canvas-design, frontend-design) in the same catalog.
Line 7 lists '.js files (generative algorithms)' as an output, but line 399 says 'don't create separate .js files' - embed inline instead.
